name: HeyReach

auth.notes: API requests use an X-API-KEY header. MCP setup uses HeyReach account/API configuration.

rateLimits: Public docs mention 60 requests per minute for the API.
notes: HeyReach has official MCP setup docs and public API/webhook docs.
A community CLI and community MCP exist, but should be treated as unofficial.
Postman documentation is useful as supplemental material, but publisher identity should be verified before treating it as authoritative.
